hero.alt: Real Estate AI Dashboard showing property listings, customer interactions, and conversational AI solutions

features.alt: Real Estate Features - Property inquiries, scheduling, and customer engagement solutions

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Hello! Thank you for calling PrimeNest Realty. I’m your AI real estate assistant, here to help with property details, schedule tours, and answer your questions anytime. How can I assist you today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hi, I’m interested in a property I saw listed online.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great! Are you looking to buy, or rent a property?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: I’m looking to buy.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. Do you have a preferred location or property type?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: An apartment in the South City area.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Got it. Are you looking for a two BHK, or three BHK?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: A two BHK.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: That’s a popular choice. We have several two BHK apartments available in South City, priced between eighty and ninety five lakhs.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: What’s your purchase timeline? Are you planning to buy soon, or just exploring options?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Hopefully within the next three months.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: That’s great to hear. Would you like to schedule an in person property tour, or a virtual tour?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: An in person visit would be better.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: No problem. I see availability tomorrow at eleven a.m., or the day after tomorrow at four p.m. Which works better for you?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Tomorrow at eleven a.m.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Perfect. I’ve scheduled your property tour for tomorrow at eleven a.m.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’ll receive a confirmation message, property address, and agent contact details shortly.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Would you also like a callback from a property consultant to discuss pricing and financing options?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: Yes, that would be helpful.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Great. I’ll arrange that for you. Our consultant will contact you with full context of our conversation.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: Is there anything else I can assist you with today?

transcript.speaker: Customer
transcript.text: No, that’s all. Thank you.

transcript.speaker: Agent
transcript.text: You’re very welcome. Thank you for choosing PrimeNest Realty. Have a great day.
